allow: Bash(curl -v -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type,Authorization')
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Simple GET through gateway: %{http_code}\\n' -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\\n' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\\n' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Authorization')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Eureka status:', d.get\('status'\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP status: %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"wrong"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type,Authorization')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3000' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Authorization')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8081/api/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type,Authorization')
Bash(curl -si http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register -X OPTIONS -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type')
